title: New York City's Daily Bridge & Tunnel Traffic: A Time Series Analysis
description: A timeline chart visualizing the flow of vehicles through major NYC crossings over one week, highlighting daily, weekly, and potential trend components for time series analysis.
relationships: Data points are plotted sequentially over time to form the time series.
The trend line smooths out the data to show the overall direction.
Annotations connect specific patterns (like weekend dips) to calendar events.
